# Kami

> A warm parchment design system for AI-assisted professional documents. One accent color, sans-serif (gothic) hierarchy, and editorial whitespace.

## Author
- Name: Tw93
- Site: https://tw93.fun

## What is Kami
Kami is a layout design system for the AI era. Give Claude (or any LLM) a brief, and it produces polished Japanese documents: one-pagers, resumes, portfolios, slides, long docs, letters, equity reports, and changelogs. The system uses a warm parchment canvas (#f5f4ed), ink-blue accent (#1B365D), and a single gothic sans-serif face, Noto Sans JP. Japanese-only.

## Key Pages
- [Showcase](https://kami.tw93.fun): Design system overview with live demos
- [Samples](https://kami.tw93.fun/samples-ja.html): Slide and document typesetting gallery
- [GitHub](https://github.com/tw93/kami): Source code and templates

## Install
Private skill from `bonginkan/design-bonginkami` (skill name: `bonginkami`).
- Claude Code / generic agents: `git clone https://github.com/bonginkan/design-bonginkami.git ~/.claude/skills/bonginkami`
- Claude Desktop: download `bonginkami.zip` from the repo Releases (or use the tracked `dist/bonginkami.zip`) and upload it in Skills settings

## Templates
- One-pager, Letter, Resume, Long document, Portfolio, Slides, Equity report, Changelog
- 14 diagram types: architecture, flowchart, quadrant, bar chart, line chart, donut chart, state machine, timeline, swimlane, tree, layer stack, venn, candlestick, waterfall

- GitHub: https://github.com/tw93
- Blog: https://tw93.fun
